name: Templar
description: An agent of a sorcerer-king's bureaucracy trained in coercion and record-keeping. Skill Proficiencies: History, Intimidation. Tool Proficiency: choose Calligrapher's Supplies or Forgery Kit. Equipment Option A: Spear, Light Crossbow, 20 Bolts, Gaming Set, Hooded Lantern, Manacles, Quiver, Templar's Clothes, 12 CP. Equipment Option B: 50 CP. Features: Templar Hierarchy; Official Inquiry. Custom feat: Templar Training (Literacy plus choose two other skills).
